_note: Real SPY forecast returned by AlphaSignal-Ensemble-Prediction on 2026-03-29. forecast_bands truncated to days 1-3 and 22 for brevity; full 22-day response has the same shape for every day.
methodology: Five-model ensemble: LSTM, XGBoost, SARIMA, Monte Carlo, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck. GARCH(1,1) volatility overlay. OU-dominant weighting (49.5%) signals mean-reversion expectation.
reasoning: Slight bullish drift (~+0.8% over 22 days toward ~$639). OU dominance signals mean-reversion around current levels. Bands widen through week 2 then stabilize. Near-term GARCH vol 1.13%. Peak uncertainty around days 6-8 (April 7-9).
